_meta.note: 29 ghost types, 6 evidence types (post-Ouija-removal evidence pool: EMF5, Ghost Orb, Spirit Box, Freezing Temps, UV/Fingerprints, Ghost Writing, DOTS Projector = 7 total, 3 assigned per ghost on default difficulty). Verify against in-game journal if a future patch changes evidence pools.

ghosts.name: Aswang
ghosts.strength: Accelerates faster with line-of-sight than any ghost; can rarely hunt with zero grace period.
ghosts.weakness: Cannot kill in official hiding spots; slower hunt base speed.

ghosts.name: Banshee
ghosts.strength: Targets one chosen player if inside; more likely to sing during ghost events.
ghosts.weakness: Distinctive wail audible on Parabolic Mic / Sound Recorder.

ghosts.name: Dayan
ghosts.strength: Hunts sooner and moves faster when a player moves nearby.
ghosts.weakness: Hunts later and moves slower when a player stands still nearby.

ghosts.name: Demon
ghosts.strength: Incense less effective; can rarely hunt at any sanity.
ghosts.weakness: Crucifix range is 50% larger than its indicator.

ghosts.name: Deogen
ghosts.strength: Always knows player location during a hunt, closes distance fast.
ghosts.weakness: Moves extremely slowly once close to its target.

ghosts.name: Gallu
ghosts.strength: Becomes aggressive when protective equipment (crucifix etc.) is used.
ghosts.weakness: Becomes less aggressive after a hunt.

ghosts.name: Goryo
ghosts.strength: DOTS only enters when no player is in the room; DOTS silhouette only visible via video camera.
ghosts.weakness: Cannot wander far from its room or change favorite room.

ghosts.name: Hantu
ghosts.strength: Moves faster in colder areas during a hunt.
ghosts.weakness: Slows in warm areas; breathes visibly during hunt if fuse box is off; never turns fuse box on.

ghosts.name: Jinn
ghosts.strength: Faster if a distant player is in line-of-sight with fuse box on; can drain large sanity chunks.
ghosts.weakness: Ability disabled if fuse box is off; never turns fuse box off itself.

ghosts.name: Kormos
ghosts.strength: Detects footsteps from far away during a hunt; hunts earlier if players sprint nearby.
ghosts.weakness: Cannot detect players visually.

ghosts.name: Mare
ghosts.strength: Higher hunt sanity threshold in the dark.
ghosts.weakness: Lower hunt threshold in light; may turn lights off right after being turned on; never turns a light on.

ghosts.name: Moroi
ghosts.strength: Moves faster at low average sanity; can curse players to drain sanity faster.
ghosts.weakness: Incense blinds it 50% longer during hunts.

ghosts.name: Myling
ghosts.strength: Footsteps only audible at closer range during a hunt (~12m vs 20m).
ghosts.weakness: Produces paranormal sounds on Parabolic Mic more frequently than other ghosts.

ghosts.name: Obake
ghosts.strength: Chance to leave no fingerprints; existing fingerprints fade sooner.
ghosts.weakness: Small chance of leaving 6-fingered prints; can briefly shapeshift model during a hunt.

ghosts.name: Obambo
ghosts.strength: Hunts earlier / moves faster in its 'aggressive' state.
ghosts.weakness: Hunts later / slower in 'calm' state; aggressive-state hunts are shorter.

ghosts.name: Oni
ghosts.strength: Increased activity when players are nearby.
ghosts.weakness: More visible during hunts; cannot do the 'airball' ghost event.

ghosts.name: Onryo
ghosts.strength: Forces a hunt after 3 flames extinguished, regardless of sanity.
ghosts.weakness: A nearby lit flame blocks its hunt like a crucifix.

ghosts.name: Phantom
ghosts.strength: Looking at it while hearing heartbeat drains sanity; may walk toward a random player.
ghosts.weakness: Photographing it makes it disappear; less visible during hunts.

ghosts.name: Poltergeist
ghosts.strength: Throws multiple objects at once, at high velocity, draining sanity.
ghosts.weakness: Powerless with no throwable objects nearby.

ghosts.name: Raiju
ghosts.strength: Moves faster near active electronics.
ghosts.weakness: Disrupts electronics from further away when hunting (15m vs 10m).

ghosts.name: Revenant
ghosts.strength: Moves much faster during a hunt once it detects a player.
ghosts.weakness: Moves very slowly while not detecting a player.

ghosts.name: Shade
ghosts.strength: Less likely to interact with environment (harder to catch).
ghosts.weakness: Cannot hunt if people are nearby.

ghosts.name: Spirit
ghosts.strength: None notable.
ghosts.weakness: Incense is more effective, blocks hunts longer.

ghosts.name: Thaye
ghosts.strength: Faster during hunts and more active early in the contract.
ghosts.weakness: Becomes slower and less active over time as players are nearby.

ghosts.name: The Mimic
ghosts.strength: Mimics abilities/traits of other ghost types.
ghosts.weakness: Always presents a fake Ghost Orb as bonus/secondary evidence.

ghosts.name: The Twins
ghosts.strength: Either twin can hunt (not simultaneously); one twin is slow, one is fast.
ghosts.weakness: Often interacts in two places near-simultaneously.

ghosts.name: Wraith
ghosts.strength: Cannot be tracked by footsteps; may teleport to a random player.
ghosts.weakness: Will not step in salt.

ghosts.name: Yokai
ghosts.strength: Talking near it raises its hunt sanity threshold sharply.
ghosts.weakness: Can only hear players within a short radius during a hunt.

ghosts.name: Yurei
ghosts.strength: Drains sanity quickly from nearby players.
ghosts.weakness: Smudging traps it temporarily; its ability slams doors.
